773827469.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900

683338155.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100

681368194.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400

681368194.en_literal: Our shared experiences on this journey have come in handy.

770758285.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
770758285.en_literal: That's how I want to be.

762713236.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
762713236.jp_real: みんなの援護のおかげさ

1041250010.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900

1041250010.english: Haha! Your flourishes are hard to miss!

336958658.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
336958658.jp_real: さし詰め、氷炎一体といったところかな？
336958658.en_literal: Looks like we're perfectly in sync.
336958658.english: A beautiful thing when two opposing forces become one.

298464158.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100

298464158.en_literal: Ah... I never thought it'd come to this.
298464158.english: Yes. More than I'd like to admit.

201202104.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
201202104.jp_real: むろんだ。誰一人傷つけさせはしない！
201202104.en_literal: Of course. I won't let anyone get hurt.
201202104.english: Agreed! None shall pass our bulwark!

340952159.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
340952159.jp_real: 私もまだ成長できている、ということだろうか。
340952159.english: Only rising, huh? Guess I need to fry bigger fish!

1007430307.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400

1007430307.english: We work well together, don't we?

572334841.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
572334841.jp_real: ああ！その期待に応えてみせよう！
572334841.en_literal: Ah! I'll show you how to live up to that expectation!
572334841.english: I know, and I won't fail your expectations.

682382204.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
682382204.jp_real: おっと、これは油断ならないな
682382204.en_literal: Oh, I can't afford to be careless here.
682382204.english: Actually, I think that's a great idea.

146390857.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
146390857.jp_real: バザラガ殿がいると安定感が違うな
146390857.en_literal: Having Vaseraga around really changes the vibe.

197654883.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
197654883.jp_real: カリオストロ殿は余裕があるな

909411136.en_literal: From now on, I'll rely on your sword too.
909411136.english: Likewise, Id. You're one of us now.

423667929.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
423667929.jp_real: 人というものは、守るものがってこそ強くなれるんだ。

423667929.english: Having someone to protect makes you strong!

215348669.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200

215348669.english: Humor has its place, but this isn't the time.

991843159.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300

1061631703.label: PL0200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600

571946194.en_literal: I'll protect you with my life.
571946194.english: Don't let them lay a finger on Historia!

137150952.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
137150952.english: Moving forward is our only option.

573091437.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
573091437.jp_real: ゼーガでの戦いにも慣れてきたな
573091437.en_literal: I'm getting used to fighting in Zegga too.
573091437.english: The monsters in this skydome aren't too bad either.

809347039.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
809347039.jp_real: 少年ばか。気を引き締めよ。
809347039.english: These next moments are crucial. Let's collect ourselves.

421990225.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
421990225.jp_real: 今までの経験を生かす時だ！
421990225.en_literal: Now's the time to put my experience to use!

1020045410.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
1020045410.jp_real: ここから先は戻れないか
1020045410.en_literal: There's no turning back from here.

851510720.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
851510720.jp_real: 不気味なところだが、進むしかないな。
851510720.en_literal: This place is creepy... but we have no choice but to move forward.
851510720.english: Let's push through this twisted place.

792239272.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
792239272.jp_real: まだ油断はできないな
792239272.en_literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down.
792239272.english: Don't let your guard down yet.

436485621.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
436485621.jp_real: みんなやるじゃないか！
436485621.en_literal: Looks like everyone's ready to go!

985965804.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
985965804.jp_real: みんなの力がこれほどとはな
985965804.en_literal: I can't believe everyone's power has grown this much!
985965804.english: The most formidable crew in the skies!

843364305.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
843364305.jp_real: みんな、いい連携だった！
843364305.en_literal: Everyone, that was a great link!

174569014.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
174569014.jp_real: みんな、うまくいったな！

844084194.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
844084194.jp_real: みんなの力があってこそだ！
844084194.english: I love when a plan comes together!

366516977.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
366516977.jp_real: みんな、このまま行くぞ！

483102938.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
483102938.en_literal: Everyone, don't let your guard down!

610262725.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
610262725.en_literal: Everyone, don't let your guard down!

799730967.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
799730967.jp_real: ああ、いつでも力を貸すよ。
799730967.en_literal: I'll lend you my power anytime.
799730967.english: You have my blade whenever you need it.

44805999.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
44805999.english: I'll always be by your side.

28746467.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
28746467.jp_real: 何のココからさらにいくぞ
28746467.en_literal: What? I'm going even further from here!
28746467.english: Let's just focus on the path ahead.

944999604.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
944999604.jp_real: あっ、この調子で行くぞ！
944999604.en_literal: Ah! Let's go with this momentum!

415092515.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
415092515.en_literal: Alright! Let's prepare for what comes next!

1047593112.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_1
1047593112.jp_real: ああ！あとは任せてもらお！
1047593112.en_literal: Ah! I'll leave the rest to you!

535391541.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
535391541.en_literal: So this is the power of the people of the stars...

222328058.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
222328058.jp_real: やるじゃないかラカム！

696386491.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
696386491.jp_real: やるじゃないかロゼッタ！

781422426.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
781422426.jp_real: 氷の双剣技か。とても参考になるよ。
781422426.en_literal: So you're using the Ice Sword technique, huh? That's really helpful.
781422426.english: Blade and ice, a powerful combination.

858326173.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
858326173.jp_real: 片付けない！ジークフリート殿！
858326173.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this, Siegfried!

527418917.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
527418917.jp_real: さすがはシャルルロッテ殿だ！

626741654.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
626741654.jp_real: お見事、ヨダルラーハ殿！

539171460.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
539171460.jp_real: ナルメア殿、見事なものだ

917624301.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
917624301.en_literal: So this is the legendary fist technique?

182160763.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
182160763.jp_real: アルベスの威力は凄まじいな
182160763.english: Our Vess is quite the weapon!

273478567.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
273478567.jp_real: うまくさばけたな。バザラガ殿のおかげだ。
273478567.en_literal: Good job handling that. It's all thanks to you, Lord Vaseraga.
273478567.english: You dealt with them in short order. Excellent work.

142510773.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
142510773.jp_real: 支援助かった！カリオストロ殿！

627132221.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
627132221.jp_real: 追撃感謝する！サンダルフォン！
627132221.en_literal: I'm grateful for your support, Sandalphon!

973841252.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
973841252.jp_real: 何気ない所作に見えて、恐ろしい拳圧を放っているな。
973841252.en_literal: Seems like an ordinary attack, but it's releasing a terrifying pressure.
973841252.english: For putting on such a carefree mask, you are a ferocious fighter.

513950645.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
513950645.jp_real: ソンだろ！うまく息があったな！
513950645.en_literal: You're good, Thorn. That was a smooth move.

356049056.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
356049056.jp_real: 協力に感謝する！ガランツァ殿！
356049056.en_literal: Thank you for your cooperation, Gallanza.

828129843.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
828129843.jp_real: あざやかな魔剣さばきだ。思わず見とれてしまうな。
828129843.en_literal: A dazzling display of swordplay. I can't help but be mesmerized.
828129843.english: Your ensorcelled blades are wonderful. Hypnotizing even.

351291414.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
351291414.jp_real: 起点を聞かせてくれたな。さすがだ。
351291414.en_literal: You let me hear your foundation. As expected.
351291414.english: Shit! You're not just quick, you're quick-witted too!

994385258.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
994385258.jp_real: 助かった！ユーステス殿！

1061998466.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
1061998466.jp_real: 守りは私に任せてもらおう
1061998466.english: Trust in me to be your shield.

796327814.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
796327814.jp_real: 追撃に感謝する。フェディエル殿。
796327814.en_literal: Thank you for the barrage, Fediel.
796327814.english: Thank you for the assistance, Fediel.

888720816.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
888720816.jp_real: ペットたちもすごい気迫だな
888720816.en_literal: Your pets are quite the show-off too.

132095208.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
132095208.jp_real: 今の技に合わせるとは、実に見事だ！
132095208.en_literal: Matching your technique with my own... truly impressive.

455629977.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
455629977.jp_real: よし、次に備えるとしよう
455629977.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next!

301576131.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
301576131.jp_real: さすがはパーシヴァル殿だ！

936052466.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
936052466.jp_real: 一部の隙もない剛の剣か。
936052466.en_literal: A flawless, unbreakable wall of steel.

12871558.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
12871558.jp_real: 素晴らしい連撃だった！

343009122.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
343009122.jp_real: ついていくのがやっとだ
343009122.en_literal: I'm finally going to follow you.

270243540.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
270243540.jp_real: 見惚れてしまいそうだよ
270243540.english: You were like elegance given form.

324248111.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
324248111.en_literal: To think I could do this with just one fist...
324248111.english: How do you constantly push your limits?

245716989.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
245716989.jp_real: さすが、柔軟な対応だった
245716989.en_literal: Not bad. That was a pretty flexible response.
245716989.english: Hah! We made quick work of them!

15421478.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
15421478.jp_real: ステミの戦い方にも見えるが
15421478.en_literal: It looks like a fight you'd see in a play.
15421478.english: You fight as if you have a death wish!

827889498.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
827889498.jp_real: 次もこの調子でいこう！
827889498.english: Keep it up for the next one!

834139535.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
834139535.en_literal: So this is the power of an angel...

84963356.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
84963356.jp_real: 凄まじい剣技だな。己の未熟さを思い知るよ。
84963356.en_literal: That's some impressive swordsmanship. You're aware of your own immaturity, aren't you?
84963356.english: Such potent swordsmanship. Hmph. You make me feel like an amateur.

1052538849.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
1052538849.jp_real: 欲しい時に援護が来る。まったく、大したものだ。
1052538849.en_literal: I'm glad you showed up when I needed you. You really are something.
1052538849.english: Just when I think the day is lost, you step in and save us.

913767124.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
913767124.jp_real: まさに大旋風といったところか
913767124.en_literal: Looks like a real storm is brewing!
913767124.english: You certainly know how to make a clean sweep.

448267416.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
448267416.jp_real: まさか、あの角度からも攻め込めるとは。
448267416.en_literal: I can't believe you can attack from that angle too!
448267416.english: It amazes me how you can attack from every angle.

42560316.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
42560316.en_literal: That was a pretty poor strike.

881079652.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
881079652.jp_real: いい流れだ！この調子でいこう！
881079652.en_literal: Good flow! Let's keep this up!

46119507.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
46119507.jp_real: 六竜の力、さすがに凄まじいな
46119507.en_literal: The power of the six dragons... it's truly amazing.
46119507.english: The power of the six dragons never fails to impress.

947323665.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
947323665.en_literal: Don't let your guard down yet!

125840375.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_2
125840375.en_literal: Let's go without letting our guard down.

127114294.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
127114294.en_literal: Now then, from here on out!

318314861.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
318314861.jp_real: ローランドの援護、感謝する！
318314861.en_literal: Thank you for your support, Roland.
318314861.english: I thank you for the protection.

609158022.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
609158022.english: How much ammo do you have left?

863129676.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
863129676.en_literal: Is your magic power still enough?

962997914.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
962997914.jp_real: 可愛いなぁ、ペットたち。
962997914.en_literal: Aww, your pets are so cute!

452770353.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
452770353.jp_real: 同じ騎士として、技を高め合いたいものだ。
452770353.en_literal: As fellow knights, I'd like to raise our skills together.
452770353.english: Take it from a fellow knight, that was sublime.

812700331.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
812700331.jp_real: この戦いが終わったら、久々に皆に手料理を振る舞うとしよう。
812700331.en_literal: After this battle ends, I'll treat everyone to a home-cooked meal for the first time in a while.
812700331.english: After we finish this quest, how's a homemade meal sound?

469520782.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
469520782.jp_real: エンテーのホムラッコ
469520782.en_literal: I'll protect you with my eternal flame.

529280630.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
529280630.jp_real: 空気を震わす剣気。まさに圧巻だな。
529280630.en_literal: A sword that makes the very air tremble... This is truly overwhelming.

114003866.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
114003866.jp_real: 美しい剣筋だ。恐れ入る。
114003866.en_literal: A beautiful sword line. I'm afraid.

519423502.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
519423502.jp_real: うーん。まだ本気を隠しているのでは？
519423502.en_literal: You're still holding back, aren't you?
519423502.english: Hmm. Why do I get the feeling you've more to show?

924611652.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
924611652.jp_real: 鋭い一閃！さすがの技だな。
924611652.en_literal: A sharp strike. That's quite the technique.
924611652.english: Few measure up to your mastery.

352342265.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
352342265.jp_real: まったく、大した護衛だ
352342265.en_literal: Not at all. It's no big deal.
352342265.english: I must say, you are quite the martial artist.

721770705.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
721770705.jp_real: ゼタ殿、援護に感謝する
721770705.en_literal: Thank you for your support, Zeta.

222443171.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
222443171.en_literal: Let's prepare for the next opponent.

157552502.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
157552502.jp_real: 私におんをうって、B君を実験台にするつもりだろうか。
157552502.en_literal: You're going to use me as a shield and make B-kun your test subject?
157552502.english: Earning my good graces to use Vern as a test subject?

235770034.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
235770034.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next!
235770034.english: We're making quick work of them!

402850739.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
402850739.jp_real: 迷いのない一撃だったな
402850739.en_literal: That was a strike without hesitation.

355091974.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
355091974.jp_real: 私もシエテ殿を見習わなくてはな。
355091974.en_literal: I must learn from you, Seofon.
355091974.english: Hah! You'll have to teach me that technique, Seofon!

6388131.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
6388131.en_literal: I didn't expect you to be this strong.
6388131.english: Phew! Your presence is our windfall!

645632097.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
645632097.jp_real: 一部の隙もない追撃だったよ、マギラフリーラ殿。
645632097.en_literal: That was a flawless pursuit, Magilou Freela.
645632097.english: Your crushing blow left nothing to be desired, Maglielle.

121228330.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
121228330.jp_real: ベアトリクス殿、支援に感謝する
121228330.en_literal: Beatrix-sama, thank you for your support.
121228330.english: Your support is much appreciated, Beatrix!

362545214.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
362545214.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next!

215816450.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
215816450.jp_real: よし！次も私が先導する！
215816450.en_literal: Alright! I'll lead the way from now on!
215816450.english: Good work. I'll take the vanguard next.

982940684.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0000
982940684.en_literal: Whatever. Just leave it to me!

1033340350.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
1033340350.jp_real: ご謙遜を。ローランド殿の剣こそ、実に凄まじい。
1033340350.en_literal: Your sword, Lord Rolan, is truly magnificent.
1033340350.english: Huh. After seeing your technique, I still have much to learn.

945951209.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
945951209.jp_real: また腕を上げたな、団長。

392454174.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
392454174.jp_real: あはは、油断は禁物だぞ。

876129699.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
876129699.jp_real: こんなものではないさ！

784669833.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
784669833.en_literal: Alright, the next one's coming right away!

343194522.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
343194522.en_literal: Still not letting my guard down.

416161442.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
416161442.jp_real: それほどでもないっす

370338339.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
370338339.jp_real: その言葉、そのまま返させてもらおう
370338339.en_literal: I'll return those words to you.
370338339.english: All of our practice paid off!

35318019.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
35318019.jp_real: ああ、メイン殿のおかげだ
35318019.english: All credit goes to you, Vane.

937275630.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
937275630.jp_real: 奇連こそ、さすがは炎帝と呼ばれるだけはある
937275630.en_literal: You're quite the warrior, Perceval. No wonder they call you the "Endless."
937275630.english: And your flame could melt its scales.

442111055.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
442111055.jp_real: ジークフリート殿に褒められるとは、光栄の至りだ。
442111055.en_literal: I'm honored to be praised by you, Siegfried.
442111055.english: I didn't know you could be so sentimental.

715928218.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
715928218.jp_real: そちらこそ、見事な剣技だ。
715928218.en_literal: You too. That was quite a display of skill.

884567450.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
884567450.jp_real: つい気迫につられてしまった
884567450.en_literal: I've been dragged into the chaos again.
884567450.english: And you fight like the raging sea.

175242690.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
175242690.english: Now you've got me fired up too!

1067892248.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
1067892248.jp_real: 無謀と感じさせないところが恐ろしい
1067892248.en_literal: It's terrifying how it doesn't even seem to feel the need to defend itself.
1067892248.english: Indeed. We make a fearsome pair.

1007833708.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
1007833708.jp_real: 甘く見てもらっては困る！
1007833708.en_literal: I'm counting on you to take this seriously!
1007833708.english: You think so low of me?

505474013.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
505474013.jp_real: はっはっは、イドに敗れ、研鑽を重ねたからこそ今がある。
505474013.en_literal: I owe my current strength to the many battles I've fought against Id.
505474013.english: Defeat at your hand pushed me to improve myself.

1064021296.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
1064021296.jp_real: 守るものがあればこそだ
1064021296.en_literal: If there's something to protect, that's when I fight.
1064021296.english: I fight harder when I'm protecting the people I love.

53727163.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
53727163.jp_real: 引き続き、前衛は任せてもらおう
53727163.en_literal: I'll take the front lines from here.
53727163.english: I was thinking more like two blades on a belt.

72897905.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
72897905.jp_real: 味方になるとこんなにも心強いとはな
72897905.en_literal: I never thought being on the same side would be so reassuring.
72897905.english: Who knew you'd make such a reliable ally?

938692057.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
938692057.jp_real: ああ、この調子でいこう！
938692057.en_literal: Alright, let's go with this momentum!
938692057.english: All the finer with you at my side.

1062250999.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
1062250999.jp_real: 今のは聞いたようだな
1062250999.en_literal: That must've been the sound you heard.

8745590.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
8745590.jp_real: ユーステス殿の狙い物
8745590.en_literal: I'll take that one for you, Eustace.
8745590.english: I'm nothing compared to your aim.

597847497.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
597847497.jp_real: 援護ならば任せてくれ！
597847497.en_literal: If you're in trouble, just leave it to me!

981750153.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
981750153.jp_real: かの六竜にそう言ってもらえるとは、光栄だ。
981750153.en_literal: To hear that from a six-star... I'm honored.
981750153.english: It's an honor that one of the six dragons finds me worthy!

412439340.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0000
412439340.en_literal: Alright. You're not hurt, are you?
412439340.english: It was nothing. You're not straining yourself, are you?

499977389.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
499977389.jp_real: うん、そこがしれないな。
499977389.en_literal: Hmm. I don't know about that.
499977389.english: He's only showing us the tip of the iceberg.

719012337.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
719012337.jp_real: 私もウカウカしていられないからな
719012337.en_literal: I can't just stand by and do nothing either.

17704049.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
17704049.jp_real: 気を抜くのは早いぞ、ラカム。
17704049.english: Oh, the fun's just beginning, Rackam!

904474964.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
904474964.english: I think so. That was great!

785871137.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
785871137.jp_real: ほめてモナにも出ないぞ

943183667.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
943183667.jp_real: 同じ氷剣の使い手として、ここは負けられないな。
943183667.en_literal: As a wielder of the same ice sword, I can't afford to lose here.
943183667.english: Two practitioners of ice and blade are better than one.

490054941.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
490054941.jp_real: それは光栄だ。白龍騎士団の団長殿と比べられるとはな。
490054941.en_literal: That's quite something. To be compared to the commander of the White Dragon Knights...
490054941.english: Truly? He's among the most honorable knights I know.

993532041.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
993532041.jp_real: あはは。次も任せてもらっても、私は構わないが。
993532041.en_literal: I don't mind if you take the next turn.
993532041.english: Shall I take the lead on the next attack?

1052856162.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
1052856162.jp_real: 騎士として、遅れを取るわけにはいかないからな。
1052856162.en_literal: As a knight, I can't afford to fall behind.
1052856162.english: Unity is the difference between a knightly order and common troops.

869802917.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
869802917.jp_real: セイキシノケンギ、ミゴトダ。
869802917.en_literal: The sacred knight's swordplay is magnificent.

280125366.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
280125366.english: Sorry, did I get carried away with the frost?

6525604.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
6525604.jp_real: ああ、簡単ではなかったが…

852037259.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
852037259.jp_real: 光栄だ、ガンダゴウザ殿。

262675740.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
262675740.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

676887606.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
676887606.en_literal: Huh? What kind of joke is that?
676887606.english: Tch. As if you need one.

95484440.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
95484440.jp_real: 私にも意地があるからな。君には負けられないさ。
95484440.en_literal: I've got my own pride, you know. I can't lose to you.
95484440.english: We're more alike than I'd care to admit.

797613881.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
797613881.jp_real: 戦場で冷静さを欠いてはいけないからな
797613881.en_literal: I can't afford to be all soft and gentle on the battlefield.
797613881.english: If you lose your cool on the battlefield, it's all over.

966435308.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
966435308.jp_real: 十天衆の剣士にそう言ってもらえるなら、光栄だ。
966435308.en_literal: If a Ten-Point Knight says that to me, it's an honor.
966435308.english: That's rich, coming from an eternal.

518226705.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
518226705.jp_real: 一瞬の判断が、戦況を左右するからな。
518226705.en_literal: A split-second decision can change the course of battle.
518226705.english: Yes, well, battles are won by good analysis.

525910181.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
525910181.jp_real: 防御で攻撃の機会を得ることもあるがな。
525910181.en_literal: Sometimes I can get a chance to attack while defending.
525910181.english: But good defense provides the opportunity to strike!

849100166.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
849100166.jp_real: この剣に誓った想いは、必ず
849100166.english: My honor is the oath I swore upon this blade.

986041484.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
986041484.jp_real: 敵はひとたまりもないだろう
986041484.en_literal: There's not a single enemy left!
986041484.english: And they never saw it coming!

705592401.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
705592401.jp_real: 問題ない。次に備えよう。
705592401.en_literal: No problem. Let's prepare for what comes next.

662981443.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
662981443.jp_real: その心遣い、きっと彼女にも届いているはずさ。
662981443.en_literal: That thoughtfulness of yours... I'm sure she can feel it too.

1002424135.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
1002424135.en_literal: Huh? What on earth are you talking about?

287243481.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0000
287243481.jp_real: ルリアの援護のおかげだ！
287243481.english: Well, you did sic Bahamut on them.

626878636.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
626878636.jp_real: あっ、オイゲンにかかれば私も若造か。
626878636.en_literal: Hah! If I'm up against Eugen, I might as well be a kid!
626878636.english: Eugen, you're the one out of breath!

540186729.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
540186729.english: Indeed! Let's keep up the pressure!

154263440.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
154263440.jp_real: この戦いが終わったら、一緒に遊ぼ。
154263440.en_literal: After this battle ends, let's hang out together.
154263440.english: Oh, does somebody wanna play when this is all over?

456291933.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
456291933.jp_real: どうかんだ。いつか手合わせをお願いしたいものだ。
456291933.en_literal: I'm honored. I'd like to fight alongside you someday.
456291933.english: Agreed! What say you to a friendly duel sometime?

84225261.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
84225261.jp_real: そうだな。それこそが騎士の矜持だと私も思う。
84225261.en_literal: That's right. That's exactly what a knight's duty is. I think so too.
84225261.english: Agreed. That is the very essence of knighthood.

590943568.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
590943568.jp_real: 任せといてくれ、パーシヴァル殿！

70750263.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
70750263.english: Oh, are we the same age?

929178696.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
929178696.jp_real: はっはっは、望むところだ！
929178696.english: How many peepers peeped a pickled... Ugh. Never mind.

515426715.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
515426715.jp_real: お手柔らかにおねがいよ
515426715.en_literal: Heh heh... I'll leave the heavy lifting to you.
515426715.english: Then we follow it to the end.

535354184.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
535354184.jp_real: ココムソウリュウ。まるで破竹の勢いだな。
535354184.en_literal: The endless flow of emeralds... It's like the unstoppable force of a wild boar.

35622606.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
35622606.jp_real: アルベスにも引けを取らないつもりだ
35622606.en_literal: I'm not backing down even against Albes.
35622606.english: I'm just happy I could hold my own against our vests.

225083602.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
225083602.jp_real: ダメだ！ビーカンで実験を行うなど、断じて許すわけには…
225083602.en_literal: No way! I absolutely won't forgive you for experimenting on B!
225083602.english: How dare you! Vern is not a science experiment!

357304783.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
357304783.jp_real: まだまだこんなものではないぞ！
357304783.english: Thanks. That means a lot coming from you.

203850165.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
203850165.jp_real: 必ず守ると、この剣に誓ったからな。
203850165.en_literal: I swore to this sword that I'd protect you.
203850165.english: Just focus on protecting our rear, will you?

800740423.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
800740423.english: They won't know what hit them.

476645822.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
476645822.jp_real: 細く、軽いからこそ、活かせる技術もあるということさ。
476645822.en_literal: Indeed, it's because I'm light that I have techniques that can be utilized.
476645822.english: It's all in the technique. Actually, I prefer a light weapon.

173342344.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
173342344.jp_real: ならば次もご一緒させていただこうか
173342344.en_literal: Then shall I accompany you again?
173342344.english: Then bring them along for training next time!

175372696.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
175372696.english: Don't worry, we're in this together!

522160753.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
522160753.en_literal: That's right. We will definitely win.

754208229.label: PL0200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
754208229.jp_real: ビーフくん、よし、力が湧いてきた！
754208229.en_literal: Fedyel! Alright, I'm feeling the power!
754208229.english: Oh, Vern... Now I'm ready to face anything.
